name: Jason Crow
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,254,627 for Jason Crow in U.S. House, CO-06. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
